title: zannichellia palustris subsp. polycarpa
intro: Zannichellia palustris subsp. polycarpa, also known as hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Zannichelliaceae and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of hornwort include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce swelling. Hornwort can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
